articles.headline: Kane eyes Lewandowski record: Tracking Europe's major goal, assist records
articles.description: Harry Kane is chasing Robert Lewandowski's incredible Bundesliga goal tally, while Kylian Mbappé seeks Champions League history. Here's the latest in Europe's record goal and assist tallies.

images.name: Harry Kane [1296x729]
images.caption: Kane scored his 20th Bundesliga goal of the season today after just 16 games.
images.credit: Photo by Tom Weller/picture alliance via Getty Images

images.name: Manchester United's Bruno Fernandes [1296x729]
images.caption: Bruno Fernandes' assist tally took a sizeable leap after Ruben Amorim was sacked as Manchester United manager.

images.name: Lamine Yamal, Kylian Mbappe [1296x729]
images.caption: Neither Kylian Mbappé nor Lamine Yamal are likely to break Lionel Messi's single-season goal and assist marks in LaLiga.

images.name: Inter Milan's Lautaro Martinez [1296x729]
images.caption: Lautaro Martinez easily leads the Seire A scoring chart, but he won't get near the single-season record.

images.name: Mason Greenwood aug 2025 [1296x729]
images.caption: Mason Greenwood was made to share the Ligue 1 top scorer title last season.

images.name: Vinicus Junior, Kylian Mbappe [1296x729]
images.caption: Kylian Mbappé is within reach of Cristiano Ronaldo's single-season Champions League goal record.
images.credit: David S. Bustamante/Real Madrid via Getty Images

images.name: Bayern Munich holds on for 3-2 win
images.caption: Harry Kane scores a brace as Bayern Munich beat Eintracht Frankfurt 3-2.

articles.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Man United keeping tabs on Stuttgart's Andrés
articles.description: Manchester United could look to the Bundesliga for their newest midfield signing. Transfer Talk has the latest.

images.name: Chema Andrés [1296x729]
images.credit: (Photo by Harry Langer/picture alliance via Getty Images)

images.name: Is Lamine Yamal the best player in the world?
images.caption: The 'ESPN FC' crew react to Lamine Yamal becoming the youngest player to score a LaLiga hat-trick this century as Barcelona beat Villarreal 4-1.

articles.headline: Arsenal win ugly vs. Chelsea; Bayern close in on Bundesliga title; more
articles.description: Arsenal muscled past Chelsea on Sunday, but coach Mikel Arteta can't be happy at how difficult things look for his team. Also: Bayern Munich likely wrapped up the Bundesliga with a Der Klassiker win.

images.name: Arsenal celeb v Chelsea 260302 [1296x729]
images.credit: Stuart MacFarlane/Arsenal FC via Getty Images

images.name: Can Arsenal ride set-pieces all the way to the title?
images.caption: Shaka Hislop and Steve Nicol wonder if Arsenal are too reliant on set-pieces to win the Premier League title.
